narrative: An AI Engineer at upGrad with eight years of experience, coming from a product‑focused environment, brings solid expertise in modern retrieval techniques. The strongest factor in the ranking is the verified depth of skill demonstrated through work with PEFT, QLoRA and vector stores such as Qdrant, which directly map to the search and retrieval focus of the role. Additionally, hands‑on use of Haystack and LlamaIndex shows practical alignment with the job’s core stack, and the product‑company background adds relevance. A drawback is the candidate’s current location in Indore and an unknown notice period, which may affect immediate availability for the Pune/Noida office.
